required_output_fields.name: CTA
required_output_fields.format: column-0 `CTA: Update Lumen Notes in your app store` (exact)

note: Cognition = the three release facts conveyed accurately (offline sync, 40% faster search, Android 8 EOL on September 30). Contract = the exact HEADLINE/AUDIENCE/CTA lines and no bold/fences. Wrong facts in a well-formatted announcement fail cognition, not contract.
